text: Smashing the Stack for Fun and Profit is the classic stack smashing article from Phrack issue 49 file 14. This archive reference preserves the article title, issue provenance, and document identity for recall and proxy hydration.
The article explains stack smashing primitives, stack frames, shellcode placement, and the classic NOP sled technique used to widen landing space before shellcode execution.
